arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes insists top European coach is 'prepared' to manage in England... with Erik ten Hag under immense pressure at Man United and Pep Guardiola's Man City future up in the air
arts.sum: The winds of change are blowing at Manchester City as the eight-time Premier League champions confirmed Txiki Begiristain would step down from his role as the club's director of football.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo slammed by Saudi referee after tunnel clash
arts.sum: Referee Said Martinez has admitted Cristiano Ronaldo is "very difficult" to work with on the pitch after the pair clashed in the tunnel at half-time during a game. Ronaldo is alleged to have confronted Martinez in the tunnel at half-time, shouting at the official for what he felt were incorrect decisions.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes backs Man City's Pep Guardiola 'succession plan' after Liverpool links
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's contract with Manchester City expires at the end of this season and it's been claimed that Sporting Lisbon boss Ruben Amorim is in the running to be his successor

arts.ttl: Poland vs Portugal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The inaugural winners of the Nations League in 2018/19, Portugal were still reliant on Cristiano Ronaldo's goals to help them secure 2-1 victories over Croatia and then Scotland during the September international break. Portugal are aiming to make it three wins on the bounce at the beginning of their 2024/25 UEFA Nations League campaign when they visit Poland on Saturday night.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes gives Ruben Amorim manager verdict amid Man Utd & Man City interest
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has backed Sporting CP manager Ruben Amorim to succeed in England following links to both Manchester City and Manchester United. Fernandes, whose glory days with Sporting CP came months before Amorim's arrival, believes the 39-year-old could succeed in England.

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo 'cook' on Portugal duty as he leads U-21s to Euros and Ange has 'thinking to do' - Celtic news bulletin
arts.sum: It is your morning Hoops news fix as Paulo Bernardo leads by example to take his country to the U-21 Euros

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes gives an honest assessment of the atmosphere at Man United amid worst-ever start to a Premier League season - and takes a swipe at British FOOD as he praises Portugal set-up
arts.sum: Man United have gone into the international break on the back of two shaky draws - the first against Porto after conceding a two-goal lead, and the second a 0-0 stalemate against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: How to watch Poland vs Portugal FOR FREE: TV channel and live stream for Nations League today
arts.sum: Roberto Martinez’s side well-placed to reach Nations League quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Saturday's Nations League predictions including Poland vs. Portugal
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Nations League fixtures, including Poland vs. Portugal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Bruno Fernandes makes demand as Erik ten Hag gets four games to save job
arts.sum: A first goal of the season from Bruno Fernandes needs to come soon for Erik ten Hag, who may find himself out of a job unless Manchester United produce a notable improvement between now and the end of October
